title: RTL unable to find element after async render
fix: Use findBy* or waitFor for async UI updates. Verify text changed by translations, feature flags, or mocked Redux state.
prevention: Prefer accessible queries and shared render helpers with Redux/router/i18n providers.

title: React act warning caused by unresolved async state update
fix: Await user events and async UI updates. Use await waitFor(...) around assertions triggered by state updates.
prevention: Standardize RTL helpers and avoid mixing fake timers with unresolved promises.

title: Type drift between API model and UI props
fix: Update the interface/type at the boundary and adjust consuming selectors/components. Fix the first compiler error first.
prevention: Add contract tests or generated type validation at API boundaries.

title: npm ci fails from package-lock drift
fix: Regenerate package-lock.json with the approved Node/npm version and run npm ci from a clean checkout.
prevention: Pin Node/npm versions in CI and avoid manual lockfile edits.

title: .NET SDK or NuGet restore mismatch
fix: Run dotnet restore with the CI SDK version. Check csproj package references and NuGet source availability.
prevention: Pin SDK in global.json and keep package references consistent across projects.

title: Schema validation failure after payload shape change
fix: Compare actual payload against schema. Add missing required fields or update the schema if the contract intentionally changed.
prevention: Add contract tests and sample payload validation in CI.

title: Jenkins agent or workspace issue
fix: Rerun on a clean workspace or healthy agent. Escalate to CI owner if multiple builds fail similarly.
prevention: Add node health checks, workspace cleanup, and disk monitoring.

title: Node heap out of memory during frontend build
fix: Inspect bundle/test growth. Temporarily increase NODE_OPTIONS only if the build genuinely needs more heap.
prevention: Track bundle size, split heavy tests, and avoid excessive test parallelism.
